title: Dressrosa Tells the Truth
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on dressrosa tells the truth within the The World Reacts to Doflamingo's Fall storyline.
scene: Dressrosa's aftermath spreads outward: civilians, rulers, Marines, Doflamingo, Jack, and the Straw Hats all react to the new political balance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shadows plotting in the Dark Against Dressrosa?

dialogue.speaker: Investigating official
dialogue.text: There's no trace of the list of secret buyers, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's clear evidence that some sort of theft went on here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So it is true...

dialogue.speaker: Investigating official
dialogue.text: All the weapons and ordnance left in the underground trade port were stolen at some point after the incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we ain't talking just one or two guns. This was a huge number. It's definitely the work of some organization.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Marines were in a huff over it too.

dialogue.speaker: Investigating official
dialogue.text: could it have been the revolutionaries?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah... it's gotta be them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: doesn't matter. Return now.

dialogue.speaker: Investigating official
dialogue.text: What an annoying bunch, those revolutionaries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just like you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey now! That's a bit of a low blow, isn't it? Hahahaha... ha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is a country of tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: One...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: After another,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The strings of darkness were hung.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet, as the count- less tragedies rained down upon them,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They held back their tears... danced and sang...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to the resounding melody of their clapping hands...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But from this cheerless, long, wretched, nameless stage, the curtain now draws back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The words of truth reach unto you:

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Our King has returned! All is well! Peace is upon us!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: I have something...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'd like to ask of you all...

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Erm, as the esteemed King Riku just told you,

dialogue.speaker: Gancho
dialogue.text: I am the Chief of the Tonta The name's Gancho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Beside me

dialogue.speaker: Mansherry
dialogue.text: is my daughter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm man- Sherry! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kya Kya:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So cute ...)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you are actually gonna make this, huh Leo-kun?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The Reverie is this year, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The day draws ever near.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems other countries have all started their preparations.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Upon visiting this country,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Travelers would certainly find one thing quite strange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Some ham, please!

dialogue.speaker: Mansherry
dialogue.text: Oh my, if it isn't Rebecca and mansherry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: For throughout the city, one can see,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Living alongside humans naturally and freely,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi ol! There are still houses left to build!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: No no! This is of utmost importance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: The tiny, little silhouettes of dwarves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a country of love... of passion... and of fairies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You know what, you're right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Waha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Dressrosa.

summary: Dressrosa Tells the Truth: Dressrosa begins to heal while Doflamingo's capture sends shockwaves through the seas, from the Marines to Jack and the Straw Hats' new bounties.
